misc: Rarely seen on the course without a drink in his hand
biography: Martin, a familiar face at St. Laurence Golf, brings a unique blend of talent and charisma to the greens. Known for his relaxed demeanor, he is rarely seen on the course without a drink in hand, a testament to his belief that golf should be enjoyed, not endured.

With 10 past appearances at the Hector Trophée, Martin is no stranger to the pressures of this esteemed tournament. His experience is matched by a singular victory in the Hector Trophée, a testament to his ability to perform under pressure and guide his partner to success.
Beyond team play, Martin has also distinguished himself as an individual, claiming the Victor Trophy on one occasion, underscoring his all-around excellence in both formats of the competition.
As he gears up for his 11st appearance at the Hector Trophée in 2026, Martin remains an active and formidable presence, ready to leverage his experience and skill in pursuit of another title.
